facade_axis_note: West facade: local x = -world y (local x increasing = world southward, i.e. local x=0 is the north end of the building, local x=8 is the south end); local y = world z (increasing upward, ground = 0)

scale_origin.note: local origin = NW corner at ground level; local x runs southward = 8.0 - world y; local y = world z
